name: python3-wsgidav
title: python3-wsgidav
description:
generic and extendable WebDAV server (Python 3)
This package contains a generic and extendable WebDAV server written in Python
and based on WSGI.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use wsgidav because generic and extendable WebDAV server (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use wsgidav as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `wsgidav [options] [args]` as documented upstream for wsgidav.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair wsgidav with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `wsgidav --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
